description: mp.gov.in is the web domain for Madhya Pradesh government online services and department portals. It includes portals such as the Pollution Control Board’s Environment Surveillance Centre and MP e-Services for government service delivery and data exchange.
summary: mp.gov.in exposes at least two documented HTTP integration surfaces: the authenticated MPPCB Central Server API for industry real-time monitoring uploads, plus a documented MP e-Services Samagra integration API with unclear public auth details; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
